# Kilo Reference Source

This directory keeps the upstream-style `kilo.c` drop that was used as the
starting point for the ArmOS Kilo port.

The maintained ArmOS command lives in:

- `userland/coreutils/src/kilo.c`

Keep this copy as a reference when comparing local terminal/editor changes with
the original single-file implementation. Do not build or install this file
directly into the user filesystem.
